title: Abortion debate with humanrightsforeveryone #9 - response to the videos you sent me

transcript.text: Okay, this is a video response to the Silent Scream, the pro-life abortion video sent to me by Human Rights for Everybody who sent it to me and asked me to comment on those videos.
So I will comment on every single video that you send me. Thank you for sending those to me, Human Rights for Everyone.
I watched the whole video, 27 minutes of it. It was gross.
I agree that every girl who gets an abortion should watch that video, should watch photos of dismembered bodies of babies, and should be informed.
But I think it's like that.
This video was false information towards the end, saying that Planned Parenthood doesn't inform girls enough.
He just said that. He didn't say why. He didn't give any evidence.
I've known people who work for Planned Parenthood, and they're not mafia people.
They're not...
Planned Parenthood is about education.
They teach kids sex education.
They have the whole...
As far as I know, I haven't Wikipedia-ed it. Maybe I should.
I will later.
But they do.
It's part of education.
And watching that video...
And I think they have kids watch that video.
That's education.
You know what abortion is about.
The comment he made about the mafia being in control of abortion clinics doesn't make any sense at all, because abortion is legal.
Anything that's legal is controlled by law-abiding citizens.
They have licenses for that.
The mafia controls stuff that's illegal, does crime, like drugs, because drugs are illegal.
The mafia would control abortion clinics if abortion was illegal, and then it would be a lot more dangerous, because they would be unethical.
They'd be unprofessional.
Girls' uteruses really would be getting punctured and permanently damaged so that they could never have babies again if it was illegal.
And that's a whole other reason why abortion needs to be legal.
And he didn't give any reasons for that.
If I were to know that the mafia is in control of abortion clinics, I would say it and I would give all the reasons of the evidence.
He didn't give any of that.
And I'm not just going to believe him.
It's like he's trying to make abortion clinic people out to be evil people.
And abortion people aren't evil people.
It's just people who want to help girls so that they don't have to deal, so that they can get an abortion.
And there's some other videos that you sent me, and I guess I'll comment on those separately, or I'll comment on this video if I have the time.
Yeah, the beginning of that video, I admit, I saw the baby squirming.
The baby does squirm around violently.
It does.
It squirms around as you stick the thing in.
So there could be a mind in there, a person in there, going, oh no, this sucks.
Get me out of here.
But it could be a defense mechanism.
All kinds of animals have defense mechanisms.
You have reflexes.
If you hit my leg with a mallet, my leg will go up.
If you pour hot water on me, or if you tickle me with a feather, I'll move just naturally.
It's probably just part of the, what's it called, autonomic nervous system.
So envisioning a little baby, and they're going, a silent scream, ah, I'm dying.
It's not thinking I'm dying, because it's been its entire life in that dark area.
It doesn't know what's going on.
Um, and my idea is that it's, is that the soul that's in, that's in, that's in, embodying
That isn't, uh, isn't really, uh, going to suffer.
And even if it does suffer, it's only for a couple of seconds.
You run a race, you lift weights, you're suffering, your muscles are burning, oh, that sucks, and
Then the race is over and you forget about it.
It's the same thing about the soul of the baby.
It experience, you know, assuming it even experiences pain, which I don't think it does.
I think that's part of the autonomic nervous system.
Assuming it does feel pain, um, it's over, the soul goes, flies off somewhere and forgets
About it.
But that's a, you know, a religious debate, and that, so that would be another video,
Unless I have the time to talk about it on this video.
Um, so, I agree it's gross, and then they go and they perforate the, uh, placenta, suck
The juices out, cut the limbs out, squash the head, take the head out.
But, um, that's about how I imagined abortion to be.
It's kind of like people, people are thinking that pro-life, pro-choice people are stupid
And they don't, they don't imagine.
But, I agree, they should make kids watch those videos.
Um, I think it shows, I don't, I don't, I think it's unethical to try to make pro-life
People out to be evil, like they're mafia, like they don't educate people enough, uh,
Without actually giving a reason for it.
Uh, they could have included that in the video.
Um, okay, now, I have a couple more minutes, so I think I'll include the other video you
Sent me about the girl trying to apply for the scholarship, the pro-life scholarship, and
She has a video of her, uh, her older brother who died in a miscarriage, but her mother was
Going to get an abortion anyway, and they have all these photos of the dead baby, um, with
His, with his skin dried up and red, and it's gross, I admit.
Um, I, for one, could never work in an abortion clinic.
Um, I can't even squash a cockroach.
I did once, but that's because a lot of people watched me and told me to, but I couldn't
Normally do that.
Um, and God bless the people who can perform abortions.
It's, it must be hard on them, it must be hard on the girl.
Why don't you think about the girl going through it?
She must have really wanted not to have a baby.
Um, and the girl on the video referred to that as being the big, biggest tragedy of her
Life, and then in the end said, you know, I'll see you one day when I go home.
So I'm imagining they're, um, religious, and that's the religious belief is that, is that,
Uh, you have one chance to live on this earth, and if you die because of a miscarriage, then
Your one chance to live on the earth is over.
Um, so trying to make abortion illegal is pushing your religion on other people.
Um, it's the same thing as, uh, all the religious control that's happened until now.
Allowing people to do with their bodies what they want is freedom.
Um, my mom, when she was like a teenager, got pregnant accidentally, tried to get an abortion.
It was illegal.
It was before Roe versus Wade traveled all over Europe looking for a doctor to get an abortion.
Couldn't find the doctor, ended up having the baby, gave it away for adoption.
And now she has to deal with going the rest of her life knowing she's never, she's got a
Baby, a son out there who she's never going to meet.
Um, and what about that being difficult on somebody?
Um, now as far as the, I don't have much time, but as far as the whole, uh, that's being a
Tragedy, a lot of pro-life people are religious.
So let me tell you this, you're being, I think you're being sacrilegious by viewing an abortion
As a tragedy or a miscarriage as a tragedy.
You're not giving proper respect to God.
Don't you think that God, everything that happens in life, it's God's plan?
Um, of course we could talk about all the wars and all the famines and all the, you know,
Slavery and all this.
Well, that's not God's plan, but that goes back to my argument that, um, that, uh, we
Are responsible for this world, what happens on this world, not what, not what happens in
The spirit world.
That baby's living in the spirit world.
So having a miscarriage wouldn't be a great tragedy.
That's just what God wanted.
Um, so yeah, when I'm looking at that baby, I'm just looking at a human form that never
Allowed, was able to be a human and was never meant to be a human.
Um, just think about all of the, I'm totally out of time, but just in closing really quickly,
Think about all the, uh, the orphans and all of the overpopulation and all the animals
That are dying and the problems with population, uh, from, and all the problems that people have
Who are unwanted babies, unwanted children.
Um, we control this world.
Let's not worry about the spirit world.
All right.
I'm out of time.
Um.
